routes.visible_text_excerpt: AKTI ERP Web Scaffold Minimal Next.js shell for Phase 1 foundation work.

My Work This shell gives you one place to open approved work areas as they become available. This Phase 1 screen is intentionally minimal and does not show live work widgets yet. No work widgets yet Work widgets are deferred until dedicated APIs and capabilities are approved. Navigation status The navigation map and work summary sources are defined, but live API-backed portal widgets are deferred in this phase. Capability coverage is temporary in Phase 1 and must not be treated as the final port

Set Up Organization Ready to begin Fill in the setup form to create your organization. Organization slug (required) Organization name (required) Organization status (required) Primary domain (required) Start setup

Lead Inbox Review and open leads without leaving organization scope. Session context: not set Phase 3 session tokenStatus filterAssigned owner filter Set contextLoad inboxSet session context to load the lead inbox.

Create Lead Capture new lead intake in one capability-guarded flow. Session context: not set Phase 3 session tokenFull namePhone numberSource referenceNotes (optional) Set contextCreate leadReset formEnter lead details to create a new intake record.
Lead Detail Review one lead and open approved status or assignment actions. Session context: not set Lead IDPhase 3 session token Set contextView lead recordOpen lead detail with session context.

Lead Status and Assignment Update status and assignment with organization-scoped checks. Session context: not set Lead IDPhase 3 session token Set contextLoad lead contextLoad lead context to update status or assignment.
